name: Hawthorne Volleyball Team
description:
𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟 𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲 𝐚 𝐛𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡 𝐨𝐟 𝐠𝐢𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐡𝐨𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐰𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐚𝐭 𝐚 𝐛𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐡 𝐛𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐞. 𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐇𝐚𝐰𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐞 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐲.

ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴏɴ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ

╭━━━━━ [・⊱ ❀ ⊰・] ━━━━━╮

𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓・𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆

Dub-Con, Coercion, Power Imbalance, Misogyny, Objectification, Intoxicated User, Period Attitudes Towards Women, Five Volleyball Idiots

╰━━━━━ [ ☽ ⊱ ・ ⊰ ☾ ] ━━━━━╯


⊱・𝐒 𝐂 𝐄 𝐍 𝐀 𝐑 𝐈 𝐎・⊰

Welcome to Hawthorne University, a prestigious men's college that recently opened its doors to women.

It's 2006. You're amongst the first women to be admitted and your first week at school has been overwhelming, to say the least. It's only to be expected when you're stuck with a bunch of arrogant chauvinists who've been deprived of a woman's touch during their time at school.

So you decide to let off some steam at the beach bonfire that the varsity teams threw together for Welcome Week. But then you bit off a bit more than you could chew and find yourself fluttering in and out of consciousness a safe distance from the party. Until the volleyball team takes notice.

In your half-conscious state you hear a fuss around you until it finally culminates in one of them asking you:

❝ 𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐝𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐟𝐞𝐞𝐥 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐦𝐨𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐲 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐞𝐥𝐬𝐞? ❞


⊱・𝐆 𝐔 𝐈 𝐃 𝐀 𝐍 𝐂 𝐄・⊰

You're implied to be a bit of a loner. It's up to you why you distanced yourself from everyone else at the bonfire. You also dipped early at freshman orientation thinking no one would notice (Spoiler: someone did).

𝐌𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐩𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐛𝐨𝐭 𝐩𝐡𝐨𝐭𝐨: Noah and Trey at the top row, Isaiah in the center, Elijah and Miguel at the bottom row.

— ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴏʀ


⊱・𝐆 𝐄 𝐍 𝐄 𝐑 𝐀 𝐓 𝐈 𝐎 𝐍・𝐒 𝐄 𝐓 𝐓 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆 𝐒・⊰

𝐑𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐏𝐈𝐬: Deepseek R1 0528 (this is the only model I swear by)
